# ibm-sg-punctuation

IBM Style Guide review for punctuation: serial/Oxford commas, colons before
lists, em/en dashes vs. hyphens, compound-adjective hyphenation, US-style
quotation marks, semicolon avoidance, ellipses, exclamation points,
parentheses, slashes ("and/or"), and list-period consistency. Checklist-
driven, no CLI arguments; composed by `docs-review-style`.

**Plugin**: [docs-skills](index.md) | **:material-check: User-invocable**

## Usage

```bash
Review punctuation and hyphenation in this file
```
